diagrams.name: package_installation_flow
diagrams.title: Package Installation Flow
diagrams.description: End-to-end activity for installing a new package: batch download scheduling, installer dispatch, binary linking, and post-install notifications.

diagrams.name: package_update_flow
diagrams.title: Package Update Flow
diagrams.description: Detecting outdated packages, downloading the new version, swapping the old installation, and running post-update scripts.

diagrams.name: package_removal_flow
diagrams.title: Package Removal Flow
diagrams.description: Removing an installed package: uninstalling binaries, cleaning download artifacts, and updating the lock file.

diagrams.name: package_download_lifecycle
diagrams.title: Package Download Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Selecting the right downloader (dist vs source), preparing the destination, performing the download, and post-download cleanup.

diagrams.name: synchronous_process_execution
diagrams.title: Synchronous Process Execution
diagrams.description: Running a shell command synchronously: building the process, capturing stdout/stderr, handling output callbacks, and returning the exit code.

diagrams.name: async_process_execution
diagrams.title: Async Process Execution & Job Queue
diagrams.description: Scheduling async jobs, starting workers up to the max-jobs limit, polling active jobs, marking done, and waiting for all to complete.

diagrams.name: repository_resolution_flow
diagrams.title: Repository Resolution Flow
diagrams.description: Creating and registering repositories, searching for packages by name/constraint, and returning resolved candidates.

diagrams.name: plugin_lifecycle_flow
diagrams.title: Plugin Lifecycle Flow
diagrams.description: Loading installed plugins, registering package capabilities, deciding autoload eligibility, adding/removing active plugins, and deactivation.

diagrams.name: archive_creation_flow
diagrams.title: Package Archive Creation Flow
diagrams.description: Resolving the output filename, building exclude patterns, selecting the correct archiver, and writing the archive to disk.

diagrams.name: proxy_resolution_flow
diagrams.title: HTTP Proxy Resolution Flow
diagrams.description: Initialising the singleton proxy manager, reading proxy env vars, selecting the right proxy for a request scheme, and applying no-proxy rules.

diagrams.name: error_handling_flow
diagrams.title: Error Handler Registration & Dispatch
diagrams.description: Registering the custom error handler, capturing PHP notices/warnings, deciding suppression via @ operator, and outputting warnings to the IO layer.

diagrams.name: autoload_generation_flow
diagrams.title: Autoload File Generation Flow
diagrams.description: Generating the autoload bootstrap: collecting class maps, writing the require list, and emitting the final autoload_real.php loader.
